name: Tossed Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 medium head of romaine lettuce, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the romaine lettuce, onion, green pepper, and tomatoes into bite-sized pieces.
2. Refrigerate the chopped vegetables in a 6-quart container until ready to serve.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the mayonnaise, French salad dressing, milk, and taco seasoning mix. Refrigerate this mixture until ready to use.
4. Brown the ground beef on medium heat, making sure to drain any excess fat.
5. Add the drained kidney beans to the cooked ground beef and stir to combine.
6. Allow the meat mixture to cool slightly before proceeding.
7. In a large bowl, toss together the cooled vegetables from step 1, browned ground beef with beans, shredded cheddar cheese, and crushed tortilla chips.
8. Pour the dressing mixture from step 3 over the salad ingredients and gently toss until everything is evenly coated.
9. Serve the tossed taco salad immediately in a salad bowl.
